title: stachys laxa
intro: Stachys laxa, also known as Betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stachys laxa include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy.
